source:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'

const props = defineProps<{
  variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'danger'
  type?: 'button' | 'submit' | 'reset'
  disabled?: boolean
  loading?: boolean
  fullWidth?: boolean
  icon?: boolean // if true, style perfectly circular or right padded
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  (e: 'click', event: MouseEvent): void
}>()

const buttonClasses = computed(() => {
  const base = ['transition-all', 'duration-200', 'flex', 'items-center', 'justify-center', 'gap-2']
  
  if (props.fullWidth) {
    base.push('w-full')
  }

  if (props.disabled || props.loading) {
    base.push('opacity-70', 'cursor-not-allowed')
  } else {
    base.push('active:scale-95')
  }

  // Variant resolution
  switch (props.variant) {
    case 'secondary':
      base.push('btn-secondary')
      break
    case 'danger':
      base.push('btn-danger')
      break
    case 'primary':
    default:
      base.push('btn-primary')
      break
  }

  return base
})

const onClick = (e: MouseEvent) => {
  if (!props.disabled && !props.loading) {
    emit('click', e)
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <button
    :type="type || 'button'"
    :class="buttonClasses"
    :disabled="disabled || loading"
    @click="onClick"
  >
    <!-- Loading spinner placeholder -->
    <svg v-if="loading" class="animate-spin -ms-1 me-2 h-5 w-5 text-current" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
      <circle class="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"></circle>
      <path class="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"></path>
    </svg>
    
    <slot></slot>
  </button>
</template>
